## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] `cargo run -- compile examples/product.zk`
- [ ] `cargo run -- run examples/product.zk --public x=5 --private y=7`

## Risks

- compatibility impact
- soundness impact
- follow-up work
